title: The Age Of Being
description: Mod expands vanilla minecraft and adds new features
body:
![Title](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/OVGnYyzb/images/8dc321c6fc0d648b73d5936f870c24d0f2f7be2d.png 'Title')

---


## Short introduction

The Age of Being is a modification that expands and improves the traditional game, making it more logical and interesting in places. The mod is under active development, and I try to release updates once a week (sometimes there may be delays). All crafting and item descriptions can be found in the wiki discord (or at least you can find what I had time to add, but gradually everything will appear there).

You can also download the mod on [curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-age-of-being)

## Brief description of the mod

- Adding crafting of some items without crafting (in the likeness of a saddle, threads)

- Tools for craft

- Changing existing crafts (for example, to create ladders from rocks you will need a chisel and a hammer)

## Available languages

- Russian
- English

## Fate of modification

This modification will pass to the new author, as well as will have a different name. Optimization may be improved (since it will not use "artificial" code). Follow the author to find out when the mod will come out.
Link to new mod: [Jerboa mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jerboa)
